parameters.query: INSERT INTO adoff_autopilot.competitor_activity (competitor, activity_type, url, title, body, happened_at, response_idea) VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7) ON CONFLICT (url) DO UPDATE SET response_idea = EXCLUDED.response_idea RETURNING id;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Normalize releases').item.json.competitor }},{{ $('Normalize releases').item.json.activity_type }},{{ $('Normalize releases').item.json.url }},{{ $('Normalize releases').item.json.title }},{{ $('Normalize releases').item.json.body }},{{ $('Normalize releases').item.json.happened_at }},{{ $json.response || '' }}
